evals.prompt: Build a LangGraph StateGraph for a multi-step content generation pipeline: plan → write → review. If quality score < 0.7, loop back to write. Max 3 retries.
evals.expected_output: Working StateGraph with conditional edges routing from review back to write on low quality, AND to END on success or max retries.
assertions: StateGraph is created with nodes: plan, write, review
Conditional edge from review routes to write on low quality and to END on pass
retry_count field is incremented and capped at 3

evals.prompt: Add a Human-in-the-Loop approval gate before the deploy node in my LangGraph pipeline. The agent should pause and wait for human confirmation.
evals.expected_output: Graph compiled with interrupt_before=['deploy'] and MemorySaver checkpointer. Resume logic shown.
assertions: MemorySaver or equivalent checkpointer is provided
Resume invocation shown with None input and thread_id

evals.prompt: Set up LangSmith tracing for my LangGraph workflow so I can monitor each node's token usage and latency.
evals.expected_output: Environment variables set (LANGCHAIN_TRACING_V2, LANGCHAIN_API_KEY). @traceable decorator shown for custom spans.
assertions: @traceable decorator is used on at least one function
